data.title: Nvidia's $500 Billion AI Investment in the U.S. Sparks Excitement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Nvidia has announced a commitment to invest $500 billion over the next four years in the United States for the production of artificial intelligence servers. U.S. President Donald Trump expressed enthusiasm about this development on Truth Social, highlighting Nvidia's plan to build AI supercomputers exclusively in the U.S. He described the announcement as exciting news and assured that all necessary permits would be expedited for Nvidia and other companies aiming to contribute to America's golden era.

data.title: Ethena Labs Ends Operations with German Regulator BaFin
data.description: According to Odaily, Ethena Labs announced on the X platform that it has reached an agreement with the German regulator BaFin to gradually cease all activities of Ethena GmbH. The company will no longer seek MiCAR authorization in Germany. Since March 21, 2025, Ethena GmbH has not conducted any minting or redemption activities, with all operations being carried out by Ethena (BVI) Limited without any interruptions or issues. Users who previously interacted with Ethena GmbH for whitelisted minting and exchanges have transitioned to Ethena (BVI) Limited as per their requests, severing any ongoing relationships with Ethena GmbH. Consequently, Ethena GmbH no longer has any whitelisted users or direct clients.

data.title: Paxos transfers more than 22.2 million PYUSD to Coinbase Institutional
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported on-chain data monitoring, about five minutes ago, the Paxos hot wallet marked address transferred 22,209,694 PYUSD to Coinbase Institutional.

data.title: Analysts claim two factors position XRP ahead of other assets for spot ETF approval by the SEC
data.description:
May 22 is the next important date to watch as the SEC must respond to Grayscale's spot XRP ETF filing by then.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350811/two-factors-positioning-xrp-ahead-of-other-assets-for-sec-spot-etf-approval?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Analyst: XRP spot ETF may be easier to get SEC approval than other assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kaiko analyst believes that the improvement in market dynamics and the launch of leveraged products last week have put XRP ahead of other assets in obtaining the approval of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for spot ETFs. May 22 is the next important date to pay attention to, because the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission must respond to Grayscale's spot XRP ETF application before that date. (The Block)

data.title: BNB Chain: Lorentz mainnet hard fork upgrade is coming soon
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain officially announced that the Lorentz mainnet hard fork upgrade will be carried out soon. The upgrade time is: 
opBNB → April 21 @ 11:00 AM (UTC+8) 
BSC → April 29 @ 01:05 PM (UTC+8) 
This upgrade is not optional - the block time will be changed: 
opBNB: 0.5 seconds 
BSC: 1.5 seconds 
If the dApp logic is not optimized for faster block speed, it may cause system abnormalities.

data.title: MEMECOIN1 rose above 0.0132 USDT, and the largest increase since its listing on LBank has reached 231%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: MEMECOIN1 rose above 0.0132 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.013262 USDT, and is now quoted at 0.012214 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 204%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 231%, and the current market value is approximately 12.21 million US dollars.

data.title: XRP price analysts project $10 next, ‘optimistic’ target of $20
data.description:
XRP (XRP) price is up 15% over the past seven from a low of $1. 61. According to several technical analysts, a sustained recovery daily close above $2. 20 will signal a strong trend reversal that could put double digits within reach
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/xrp-price-analysts-10-optimistic-target-of-20?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Gate.io Launches Freedogs(FREEDOG) Spot Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io has launched Freedogs (FREEDOG) spot trading at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 15.

data.title: Japanese listed company Value Creation plans to purchase an additional 100 million yen of Bitcoin
data.description: According to market news: Value Creation, a real estate and digital transformation company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, announced that it will purchase an additional 100 million yen (about 700,000 US dollars) worth of Bitcoin.
